CustomField.description: Summary of federal protection areas and environmental constraints identified within proximity of the project location by the NEPA_GIS_Proximity_IP. Auto-populated when nepa_location_lat__c and nepa_location_lon__c are set. Each line lists the layer label and matching feature name(s). Read-only — updated by Integration Procedure.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Federal protection areas (wetlands, Superfund, critical habitat, EJ) identified near this project. Auto-populated by GIS proximity check.
CustomField.label: Protection Areas
